description: Companion repository for behavior change, habit formation, routines, cues, friction, self-regulation, intervention design, maintenance, and relapse.

articles.title: What Is Behavior Change?
articles.summary: A foundational article on changing action patterns across context and time.

articles.title: Why Information Alone Rarely Changes Behavior
articles.summary: Why awareness often fails without context, motivation, and design.

articles.title: Behavior as Pattern, Routine, and Environment
articles.summary: Behavior as repeated action situated in material and social settings.

articles.title: The Psychology of Habit Formation
articles.summary: How habits emerge, stabilize, and become automatic.

articles.title: Automaticity and Repeated Action
articles.summary: How repeated behavior becomes less effortful and more automatic.

articles.title: Behavior Change as Systems Design
articles.summary: Behavior change as environment, feedback, friction, and support.

articles.title: Cues, Triggers, and Behavioral Context
articles.summary: How contextual cues initiate and stabilize action.

articles.title: Habit Loops: Cue, Routine, Reward
articles.summary: A practical model of habit architecture.

articles.title: Friction, Convenience, and Environmental Design
articles.summary: How ease and effort shape behavioral patterns.

articles.title: Repetition, Stability, and Behavioral Momentum
articles.summary: How repetition builds durable behavioral tendencies.

articles.title: Breaking Bad Habits
articles.summary: How unwanted routines weaken, shift, or get replaced.

articles.title: Building Durable Habits
articles.summary: How habits persist through design, feedback, and identity.

articles.title: Relapse, Recovery, and Behavioral Drift
articles.summary: Why behavior change often decays and how maintenance works.

articles.title: Goal Setting and Behavioral Commitment
articles.summary: How goals become behavior through constraints and commitments.

articles.title: Self-Control and Delayed Gratification
articles.summary: Temporal tradeoffs, temptation, and self-regulation.

articles.title: Implementation Intentions
articles.summary: If-then plans and behavior under realistic conditions.

articles.title: Commitment Devices
articles.summary: Systems that help align present behavior with long-term goals.

articles.title: Identity-Based Behavior Change
articles.summary: Behavior change rooted in self-concept and social identity.

articles.title: Feedback, Progress, and Motivation
articles.summary: How feedback systems sustain change.

articles.title: Emotional Regulation and Habit Stability
articles.summary: Emotion, stress, and the maintenance of routines.

articles.title: The Transtheoretical Model of Change
articles.summary: Stages of change, readiness, action, and maintenance.

articles.title: COM-B: Capability, Opportunity, and Motivation
articles.summary: The COM-B model and its role in intervention design.

articles.title: The Behavior Change Wheel
articles.summary: Intervention functions and policy categories for behavior change.

articles.title: Fogg Behavior Model
articles.summary: Motivation, ability, prompt, and behavior.

articles.title: Sustainability Behavior Change
articles.summary: Behavior change in climate, energy, conservation, and consumption.

responsible_use: Educational and research-scaffolding examples only; not operational guidance without validation and ethical review.
